overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a sunlit urban street. The scene features a striking contrast between rundown low-rise residential buildings in the foreground and futuristic holographic skyscrapers in the distance, with palm trees and utility poles lining the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with concrete retaining walls and utility poles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily behind two pedestrians on the right sidewalk, approaching a person leaning against the wall

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking ahead, one with green hair and one wearing a yellow plaid shirt
person leaning against the concrete retaining wall on the left side of the path

entered.detail: tall concrete barrier running along the left side of the sidewalk
small green residential building with weathered wooden siding
large metal utility tower with multiple crossbars and wires
futuristic skyscrapers with holographic advertisements and neon displays visible in the distance
metal chain link fencing visible behind the concrete barrier

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit residential sidewalk bordered by a concrete retaining wall on the left and modest houses on the right. Two pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction, while the distant futuristic city skyline looms ahead with towering holographic advertisements.

events.description: character begins crossing the road from the right sidewalk to the left sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the asphalt road from right to left while maintaining pace with the two pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: the two pedestrians continuing ahead across the street toward the opposite sidewalk

entered.detail: paved road surface with yellow dividing lines and red curb markings
low concrete divider separating the road from the opposite sidewalk
tall palm tree visible on the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the sidewalk onto the asphalt road, crossing toward the left side while vehicles pass by in the background. The two pedestrians ahead continue across the street as the character transitions from the residential right side to the left sidewalk area.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with industrial fencing and palm trees

events.description: character passes a parked police vehicle on the left side of the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the left sidewalk past industrial buildings and palm trees, moving away from the previous pedestrians

entered.detail: industrial building with corrugated metal siding and rusted roof
metal fencing running parallel to the sidewalk with orange construction barriers
small green and yellow food vending structure with signage
black and white police vehicle parked on the side of the road
futuristic aircraft hovering in the sky above the city

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down the left sidewalk past industrial warehouses and chain-link fencing, with palm trees lining the path. A flying vehicle hovers in the distant sky above the approaching skyscrapers. The segment ends as the character passes a parked police car near colorful street vendors.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit urban district that transitions from a modest residential neighborhood into a more industrial zone beneath a futuristic skyline. It begins with the character walking along a sidewalk bordered by a concrete wall and small houses, following two pedestrians toward a distant horizon of towering holographic advertisements. As the character moves forward, the perspective shifts from the sidewalk onto the asphalt road, crossing through passing traffic to reach the opposite side of the street. The scene then expands as the character proceeds down the left sidewalk, where the residential houses give way to industrial warehouses, chain-link fencing, and lining palm trees. Finally, the camera glides past a hovering vehicle in the sky and a parked police car near colorful street vendors as the futuristic city looms closer.
